channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: X5 LARGE Pot Holes, 11th March
item.description:
Large pot holes on road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 235 Waterloo Passage rear of Kilburn High Road, 11th March
item.description:
3x forklift pallets have been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Mie than 10 inches, 11th March
item.description:
While driving left in towards New Beckenham train station, there is a massive hole which we drive over this morning and it’s popped my tire it’s right on top of the footpath entrance into New Beckenham train station entrance. It’s got worse over the last few months but this is ridiculous today that I have now popped a tire.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 110 High Holborn fire exit door by the gymbox, 11th March
item.description:
Hi all, for the last few months we been having homeless people have blocked the fire with various furniture Is there anything we can do about this? The tenants are complaining and are concerned about access to the fire exit. Please let me know if there is any action we can take to resolve this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110, Procter Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Mattress Also another at front, next to temporary railings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no reg plates front or rear., 11th March
item.description:
Car parked outside 3b bouverie road with no reg plates front or rear.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Children's play equipment dumped, 11th March
item.description:
The flytipping is blocking the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported issue re abandoned van remains unresolved, 11th March
item.description:
I reported this on February 17th (8942687) and received the message that the matter was now resolved. It clearly is not resolved as I took this photo yesterday. The van is now being vandalized creating increased hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastcote Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin overflowing, 11th March
item.description:
The rubbish bin is overflowing with coffee cups, dog poo bags etc and there are some articles of clothing dumped on the pavement. Please arrange to remove all this rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole between potholes, 11th March
item.description:
My suspension goes 'thump' when i drive through it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownspring Drive, Eltham

item.title: Dumped wooden bed frame and sofa, 11th March
item.description:

item.title: Graffiti on right hand side of entrance to 124 Annerley Road, 11th March
item.description:
Non-offensive graffiti of black pen tags on white painted wall, on right hand side of entrance to 124 Annerley Road. Approx 30cm wide, 50cm tall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on litter bins in Pickhurst Green, 11th March
item.description:
There is graffiti on the litter bins in Pickhurst Green. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish all thrown there, 11th March
item.description:
All along PARK MEAD there is rubbish thrown on the grass verges between the A2 and park mead Gas canisters, furniture, bottles, cans, garden rubbish, crisp packets etc etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
